display.purpose: Page greetings / hero titles; accent word in teal. The loudest the UI gets.

title.purpose: Card and form-section titles — most headings live here.

label.purpose: Uppercase mono eyebrows, rail/table headers, status pills.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Default card resting shadow — barely visible; border carries structure.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: The single consistent focus glow on every input/control.

motion.name: ease-fast
motion.purpose: Default state transition for buttons, inputs, cards.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: The one tactile feedback on button :active.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Honored via prefers-reduced-motion; required for field/low-end devices.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single saturated action. Deep Field Teal fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; height:34px; padding:0 14px; border-radius:8px; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:-0.005em; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; color:#fff; background:#0F766E; border:1px solid #0F766E; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,118,110,.18); cursor:pointer; transition:background .12s, border-color .12s, transform .05s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#115E59; border-color:#115E59; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(.5px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #fff; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default neutral action. White surface, hairline border, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; height:34px; padding:0 14px; border-radius:8px; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:-0.005em; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; color:#0B1220; background:#fff; border:1px solid #D6DBE3; cursor:pointer; transition:background .12s, border-color .12s, transform .05s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background:#EEF1F6; border-color:#B6BFCD; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform:translateY(.5px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #0F766E; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Canonical field. Hairline stroke; teal border + soft glow on focus.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Form alias" aria-label="Form alias" />
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; height:36px; padding:0 12px; background:#fff; border:1px solid #D6DBE3; border-radius:8px; font-size:13.5px; color:#0B1220; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; outline:0; transition:border-color .12s, box-shadow .12s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#5A6473; } .ds-input:focus { border-color:#0F766E; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #CCFBF1; }

components.name: Type Badge / Chip
components.description: Soft-fill pill with matching ink. Mono for type/count, sans for status.
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:999px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.01em; font-family:JetBrains Mono,ui-monospace,monospace; background:#CCFBF1; color:#134E4A; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat-by-default container; rest shadow idle, lift on hover. Never nested.
components.html:
Kobo source

Connect a form to fetch its schema.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #E5E8ED; border-radius:12px; padding:20px 22px; box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(11,18,32,.04), 0 1px 2px rgba(11,18,32,.04); transition:border-color .12s, box-shadow .12s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color:#B6BFCD; box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(11,18,32,.04), 0 4px 14px rgba(11,18,32,.06); } .ds-card__title { font-size:15.5px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-0.01em; color:#0B1220; line-height:1.2; } .ds-card__sub { font-size:12.5px; color:#5A6473; margin-top:3px; line-height:1.5; }

components.name: Tab Navigation
components.description: Workflow tab strip; active = teal text + 2px teal underline + mono step badge.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display:flex; gap:2px; padding:0 8px; background:#F5F7FA; border-bottom:1px solid #E5E8ED; } .ds-tab { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; height:48px; padding:0 14px; border:0; background:transparent; border-bottom:2px solid transparent; font-size:13.5px; font-weight:500; color:#2A3447; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:color .12s; } .ds-tab:hover { color:#0B1220; } .ds-tab--active { color:#0F766E; font-weight:600; border-bottom-color:#0F766E; } .ds-tab__num { font-family:JetBrains Mono,monospace; font-size:10.5px; padding:1px 5px; border-radius:4px; background:#CCFBF1; color:#0F766E; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #0F766E; outline-offset:-2px; }

narrative.overview: This is a workbench, not a showcase. A field coordinator or M&E officer arrives with a survey and a deadline, and the interface lays the complex pipeline out flat and legible, one step at a time. Built on cool-slate neutrals with a single rationed Deep Field Teal accent that carries every primary action, active state, and focus ring. Structure comes from hairline borders and spacing, not shadows. Monospace is reserved for machine-truth; sans is for what humans read. It rejects engineer-only density, consumer/playful SaaS, and generic AI-template slop.
keyCharacteristics: Cool-slate neutrals + one rationed teal accent (committed-restrained strategy)
Flat by default; 1px borders and spacing carry structure, shadows respond to state
Sans for prose, mono for machine-truth (keys, tokens, counts, logs)
Pill badges and soft-tinted status colors (teal / green / amber / rose / violet)
Quiet, precise, institutional — credibility over flourish

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Deep Field Teal is the only saturated color permitted to signify an action or selection. If a screen has more than one teal primary, one of them is lying. Status colors report state; they never compete for 'click me.'

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Literal Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for machine-truth — kobo keys, placeholder tokens, IDs, counts, file sizes, log lines. Never set human-facing prose in mono to look 'technical.'

rules.name: The Quiet-Heading Rule
rules.body: Headings earn size by importance, not by reflex. Card titles sit at 14–15.5px; only true page-level titles reach Display. A wall of large bold headings is forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest with a 1px border. A shadow that isn't responding to hover, focus, or a true overlay (modal/menu) is forbidden. If depth is needed to separate two resting surfaces, change the background tint or add a border — not a shadow.

dos: Do keep Deep Field Teal (#0F766E) as the only action/selection color.
Do carry structure with 1px borders and spacing; reserve shadows for hover, focus, and true overlays.
Do use JetBrains Mono only for machine-truth and Inter for everything a human reads.
Do give every interactive control the teal focus ring and a real <button> / labeled <input>.
Do write labels, hints, and errors in plain language, not implementation terms.
Do keep status colors soft-filled with matching ink so they report state without competing for attention.
donts: Don't build an engineer-only feel — the terminal stays docked and optional, never required.
Don't drift into consumer/playful SaaS — no decorative gradients, mascots, or emoji-bubbly styling.
Don't ship generic AI-template slop: no cream/sand backgrounds, no tracked-uppercase eyebrow on every section, no identical card grids.
Don't nest a card inside a card; use a bordered row or a tinted inset.
Don't use border-left/right > 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't introduce a second saturated primary.
Don't add ambient shadows to separate resting surfaces — change the tint or add a border.
